titleStmt.title: SII 5.167: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 167. (A.R. No. 527 of 1893). ON A PILLAR IN THE MASJID AT ELLORE, ELLORE TALUK, KISTNA DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
